channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Michelle Obama and her brother to launch a podcast with weekly guests
item.description: Michelle Obama and her brother, Craig Robinson, will host a new weekly podcast series starting this month featuring a special guest pulled from the world of entertainment, sports, health and business.
item.dc:creator: Mark Kennedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: First and last spots in March Madness riding on outcome of conference tournaments
item.description: The No. 1 overall seed in the NCAA Tournament along with the last spots in the 68-team field will be riding on the outcome of a plethora of conference tournaments this week.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Report: Bears sign center Drew Dalman to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have signed top free agent center Drew Dalman, according to ESPN's Adam Schefter. The 26-year-old former Falcon completes an overhaul of the Bears' interior offensive line after Poles and company jumped the market by trading for guards Joe Thuney and Jonah Jackson.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Panthers make Jaycee Horn the highest-paid cornerback in the NFL with $100M deal, AP source says
item.description: According to a person familiar with the situation, Jaycee Horn has agreed to a four-year contract extension with the Carolina Panthers worth $100 million, including $70 million guaranteed, making him the highest-paid cornerback in the NFL.
item.dc:creator: Steve Reed, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Outfielder Lawrence Butler and Athletics finalize $65.5 million, 7-year contract
item.description: Outfielder Lawrence Butler and the Athletics have finalized a $65.5 million, seven-year contract, another major investment for a team preparing to spend three seasons playing in a temporary minor league home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Medics who treated soccer legend Maradona before his death go on trial for homicide
item.description: BUENOS AIRES, Argentina (AP) — Seven members of the medical team that treated Argentine soccer great Diego Maradona before his death will go on trial for homicide starting Tuesday in Buenos Aires.
item.dc:creator: DÉBORA REY and SERGIO FARELLA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Stephen Curry joins alma mater Davidson as assistant GM for basketball
item.description: DAVIDSON, N.C. (AP) — Golden State Warriors guard Stephen Curry will serve as an assistant general manager for Davidson College’s basketball teams. The four-time NBA champion and two-time league MVP will be the first active player in U.S.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Women's runner hospitalized after falling unconscious during distance race at European Championships
item.description: Women's athlete Maureen Koster was knocked unconscious when she fell down at the European Indoor Championships on Sunday, and was later taken to a hospital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Rays get 120 hours to make the Yankees' spring stadium their own. Here's how they'll do it
item.description: When Tampa Bay players leave Steinbrenner Field following the New York Yankees’ spring training home finale on March 23, their staff will launch a 120-hour transformation of the ballpark for the Rays’ season in exile from storm-damaged Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Davante Adams agrees to a 2-year, $46 million contract with the Los Angeles Rams
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Receiver Davante Adams agreed to terms on a two-year deal with the Los Angeles Rams on Sunday, bringing the three-time All-Pro back to his native California.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: DK Metcalf is leaving Seattle for Pittsburgh with a new deal in tow, AP sources say
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — The Pittsburgh Steelers finally have their established big-play wide receiver. The Seattle Seahawks are sending two-time Pro Bowler D.K. Metcalf to Pittsburgh for at least a second-round pick, sources with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boys Rugby: Cathedral Catholic 28, La Costa Canyon 17
item.description:
The High School Boys Rugby Championship was held in Del Mar as the Cathedral Catholic Dons hosted the La Costa Canyon Mavericks.
It was the Dons who came out victorious, defeated La Costa Canyon by a score of 28-17, to win their 5th straight Rugby Championship.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: NFL legend Eddie George agrees to become Bowling Green's next head coach job: report
item.description: Eddie George, a Heisman Trophy winner, spent the past four years as the Tennessee State coach. But he is leaving to take the head coaching job at Bowling Green, per reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Buffalo Bills release NFL's active sacks leader Von Miller in a salary cap-saving move
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — The Buffalo Bills announced the long-anticipated decision to release Von Miller on Sunday, parting ways with the aging edge rusher whose contract proved too expensive for his dwindling playing time and production.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin sets World Cup podiums record with 3rd place in a slalom won by Katharina Truppe
item.description: ARE, Sweden (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin set an all-time World Cup record Sunday with her 156th podium finish though she let victory slip away in a slalom.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU pulls away from Utah for 8th straight win, 85-74
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team is rolling into the postseason. Dawson Baker scored 15 points and Richie Saunders added 14 to lead No. 23 BYU to an 85-74 victory over rival Utah on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Stamkos finishes 14th career hat trick in OT to give Predators 3-2 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Steven Stamkos scored at 2:39 of overtime to complete his 14th career hat trick and the Nashville Predators beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giddey scores 26 to lead Bulls' comeback from 17 down to beat the Heat 114-109
item.description: Josh Giddey scored 26 points and the Chicago Bulls rallied from a 17-point, first-half deficit to beat the Miami Heat 114-109 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Kessler pulls down 25 rebounds in Jazz loss at Toronto
item.description: TORONTO (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler set a career high with 25 rebounds, to go along with a team-high 18 points and a career-high eight blocks, but it wasn't enough to prevent another loss by the Utah Jazz, who fell at Toronto Friday night, 118-101.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Raiders acquire quarterback Geno Smith from Seahawks for a 3rd-round pick, AP source says
item.description: The Las Vegas Raiders answered their most pressing personnel question of the offseason Friday by acquiring quarterback Geno Smith in a trade with Seattle and reuniting him with his former coach, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bay FC coaching staff facing investigation after complaints over head coach
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Days after Bay FC unveiled renderings for its slick new training facility on Treasure Island, the team is facing more troubling allegations regarding its backroom staff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Yanni Gourde back where he belongs, in Tampa Bay
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning organization believes that adding two elite forwards Yanni Gourde and Oliver Byorkstrand will be the push they need to make a deep playoff run.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lightning acquire Gourde,Bjorkstrand as NHL trade action heats up
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning have answered the cross-state-rival and defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers' first couple of additions ahead of the NHL trade deadline with a big move of their own.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bulls Fest 2025: Team announces dates, registration open for 3v3 tournament
item.description: CHICAGO — Registration is now open for Bulls Fest 2025, which will be held outdoors on the United Center campus from Aug. 23-24, the team announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 28 and NBA-best Cavs beat Bulls 139-117 for 11th straight win
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 28 points, Jarrett Allen added 25 points and 17 rebounds, and the NBA-best Cleveland Cavaliers won their 11th straight game, 139-117 over the Chicago Bulls on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
